LANDING.TITLE: Abel Constantino
LANDING.SUBTITLE: Frontend Developer specialized in Angular
LANDING.DESCRIPTION: Welcome to my personal portfolio. Here you will find information about me, my interests and an interactive collection of games, books, movies and series that are part of my world.
LANDING.PREVIEW_DESCRIPTION: This portfolio not only shows who I am, but also part of my tastes, hobbies and cultural references through different collections.

CARDS.GAMES_TEXT: A table with the games I have enjoyed, organized by genre and filterable by name and category.
CARDS.BOOKS_TEXT: A selection of books with filters by title and category to better explore my reading tastes.
CARDS.MOVIES_TEXT: Movies that have inspired or entertained me, shown in a visual carousel format.
CARDS.SERIES_TEXT: Series I follow or have finished, also presented in a visual carousel format.

LOGIN.TITLE: Login
LOGIN.DESCRIPTION: Enter your credentials to access the portfolio.

ABOUT.TITLE: Get to know me a little better
ABOUT.INTRO: This section summarizes who I am, how I started in technology and what motivates me to keep learning and building projects.
ABOUT.CARD1_TEXT1: I am Abel Constantino and I am especially interested in frontend development, building modern interfaces and creating interactive experiences that combine design and functionality.
ABOUT.CARD1_TEXT2: I enjoy learning new technologies and constantly improving the way I structure applications, write cleaner code and build projects that reflect both technical and personal sides.
ABOUT.CARD2_TEXT1: Step by step I became interested in web development and discovered that I especially liked the visual side of applications: layout, reusable components, animations and interface organization.
ABOUT.CARD2_TEXT2: Angular has allowed me to work with concepts such as services, guards, interceptors, forms, internationalization and reactive state with observables and signals, helping me build much more complete projects.
ABOUT.CARD3_TITLE: What I want to express with this portfolio
ABOUT.CARD3_TEXT1: This portfolio is not meant to be just a presentation, but also a way to show how I think and how I organize a real Angular project: authentication, protected routes, coherent design, filters, shared components and a carefully crafted visual experience.
ABOUT.CARD3_TEXT2: It also reflects part of my hobbies and personal tastes, such as games, books, movies and series, so the project has a more personal and close identity.

DESCRIPTIONS.INTERSTELLAR: An epic journey through space and time in search of hope for humanity.
DESCRIPTIONS.BLADE_RUNNER_2049: A visually stunning sequel that expands the Blade Runner universe with a unique atmosphere.
DESCRIPTIONS.THE_DARK_KNIGHT: One of the most influential superhero films, featuring a legendary performance by the main villain.
DESCRIPTIONS.LOTR_RETURN_OF_THE_KING: One of the greatest fantasy films ever made. Dive into the resolution of the Ring’s journey and its characters in this epic cinematic milestone.
DESCRIPTIONS.LOTR_FELLOWSHIP: The beginning of one of the most important fantasy and adventure sagas in film history.
DESCRIPTIONS.DUNE_PART_TWO: A visual and narrative spectacle that continues Paul Atreides’ story in a vast and hostile universe.
